statuses.partial: Implemented for the browser-safe subset, with known gaps tracked.
statuses.stubbed: Resolvable for package probes; behavior is no-op or deliberately narrow.
statuses.blocked: Resolvable, but faithful behavior is blocked by browser or security limits.
